design_philosophy.name: E1 Organic Trust
design_philosophy.description: A clean, trustworthy, and community-focused design that blends Swiss minimalist clarity with warm, organic tones suitable for a Pakistani community context. It avoids the cold 'tech blue' in favor of deep emeralds and warm sands.

primary.name: Emerald Trust
primary.description: Used for primary actions, active states, and brand identity. Represents growth and Islamic finance values.

secondary.name: Amber Wealth
secondary.description: Used for financial metrics, money-related highlights, and warnings.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-6) for cards to allow breathing room.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-emerald-700 text-white hover:bg-emerald-800 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-8 py-6 h-auto
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white text-emerald-700 border-2 border-emerald-100 hover:bg-emerald-50 transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-6 h-auto
buttons.ghost: rounded-full hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 font-medium px-4 py-3

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 p-6
cards.stat: flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-emerald-100 transition-colors

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-100 transition-all duration-200 h-12

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-200 p-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50 md:hidden
navigation.desktop_sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 p-6

visual_enhancers.textures: Grain overlay on hero sections for organic feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Public Sans' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts.
For the dashboard, use a 'Bento Grid' layout. The 'Total Pending Fee' should be the hero card (largest).
Implement a Mobile-First navigation bar at the bottom for easy thumb access.
Use the 'Emerald Trust' color (#047857) for primary buttons and active states.
Ensure all monetary values are formatted clearly (e.g., 'PKR 5,000').
Use the provided image URLs for the respective fund categories in the 'Fund Allocation' section.
The login screen should be extremely simple: Logo, Phone Input, PIN Input. No clutter.
Notifications must use the 'Sonner' toast library.
Adhere to the 'High Density' grid rules for the Admin Dashboard to show maximum data without scrolling.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
